  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_3:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/JsonConfig \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Kartographer mediawiki/extensions/Scribunto mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages

  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/cldr
